hero.title: Reveal your natural [glow]
hero.subtitle: Your personalized skin analysis and your 100% natural routine.

beforeAfter.title: A new way to [glow]
beforeAfter.body: Glow analyzes every area of your skin, spots what can be enhanced and guides you with natural care. The result: softer, clearer, more radiant skin. Slide to see the difference.
beforeAfter.disclaimer: Illustrative results, varying from person to person and with how consistently you follow your routine.

steps.title: Scan your face, area by area
steps.text: You scan every part of your face with your camera. The AI captures each area precisely for a reliable analysis.

steps.title: Your skin assessment
steps.text: Glow assesses your skin quality: hydration, radiance, tone, dark circles, texture, blemishes, brow density, and more. Each area gets a score and a clear explanation.

steps.title: Your personalized plan
steps.text: You get a plan that highlights your strengths, your areas to improve and the best ways to enhance your skin — with 100% natural products and a tailor-made routine.

compare.title: A new way to [care for yourself]
compare.subtitle: No more random products and routines you give up on. Glow guides you, step by step, toward healthier skin — naturally.
newSteps: A precise AI scan of your skin
A personalized analysis, area by area

features.title: Everything you need to [glow]
features.subtitle: Ever wondered what your skin really needs? Glow reveals it.

items.title: Precise analysis, area by area
items.text: Our AI examines every part of your face and gives you a score, a clear explanation and targeted advice.

items.title: 100% natural, zero risk
items.text: Only clean, verified products, with no harsh substances. No surgery, ever.

items.title: A routine that adapts to you
items.text: After each scan, your routine updates automatically and follows you day to day.

items.title: Made for every skin
items.text: All skin types and all complexions, with no standardized recommendations.

items.name: Léa
items.quote: In 3 weeks, my skin is transformed. 100% natural — I love it.

items.name: Thomas
items.quote: Finally an app that tells me what to do, simply. My routine is tracked every day.

items.name: Inès
items.quote: The scan is super accurate, my skin has never looked so radiant.

usages.title: The morning scan
usages.text: 30 seconds in front of the camera to track how your skin evolves.

usages.title: Your guided routine
usages.text: Simple steps, reminded at the right time, day after day.

usages.title: Your progress in photos
usages.text: Compare your scans over time and watch your skin improve.

usages.title: Natural products
usages.text: Clean recommendations, filtered of risky ingredients.

items.a: No. Glow is a wellness tool that helps you care for your skin naturally. For any medical issue, see a healthcare professional.

items.q: Are the recommended products really natural?
items.a: Yes. Each product is selected and filtered to exclude risky ingredients.

items.q: How long until I see results?
items.a: It varies from person to person, but a regular routine delivers visible results within a few weeks.
Yes. Your images are encrypted, private, and you can delete them at any time.

items.q: Can I try it for free?
items.a: Yes, your first scan is free.

finalCta.title: Start your [glow up] today
finalCta.subtitle: Your first scan is free. Discover your potential in 30 seconds.

footer.tagline: Your natural glow, guided by AI.
footer.disclaimer: Glow is not a substitute for advice from a dermatologist.

auth.subtitleSignin: Log in to find your analyses.

auth.createdInfo: Account created! If email confirmation is on, check your inbox.
auth.resetSent: Reset email sent. Check your inbox.
auth.errPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
auth.errExists: An account already exists with this email.
auth.errNotConfirmed: Confirm your email before logging in.
auth.errRate: Too many attempts, try again shortly.

settings.title: My preferences
settings.name: What should we call you?
settings.productGenderHint: Defaults to your gender. “Mixed” shows everything, “Neutral” only universal products.
settings.allergiesHint: Products containing these ingredients will be strictly excluded.
